title: Apps
heading: Apps
intro: Games and apps from BarkinMad Studios.

sections.title: Games
sections.description: Retro-inspired arcade games built around simple controls, quick sessions, score chasing, and classic pick-up-and-play gameplay.

sections.title: Darts Apps
sections.description: Mobile darts scoring and statistics apps for match play, party games, and practice sessions.

sharedSystems.title: Shared Game Systems
sharedSystems.intro: Supported games can share achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, PvP modes, and roadmap features across the BarkinMad Studios ecosystem.
